name: 朋友圈
description: v0.9.2：调试加强版 - document级事件监听+root健康检测+可复制日志，用于定位第二次侧边栏点击失效根因。支持user人设绑定多char、AI评论互动、记忆挂载。安装后请把 entry 改成你自己的 GitHub Raw 链接。
author: RocheMoments
iconImage: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><g transform='translate(50,50)'><g transform='rotate(0)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(255,92,92)'/></g><g transform='rotate(45)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(255,169,77)'/></g><g transform='rotate(90)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(255,212,59)'/></g><g transform='rotate(135)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(105,219,124)'/></g><g transform='rotate(180)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(77,171,247)'/></g><g transform='rotate(225)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(116,143,252)'/></g><g transform='rotate(270)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(177,151,252)'/></g><g transform='rotate(315)'><ellipse cx='0' cy='-22' rx='7' ry='22' fill='rgb(255,107,157)'/></g><circle r='6' fill='white'/></g></svg>
